entries.translation: Том сказал, что ты не умеешь плавать.

entries.word: Many people don't know how to swim.
Tom was the one who taught Mary how to swim.
Tom is learning how to swim.
Unlike my brother, I can't swim.
entries.translation: В отличие от своего брата, я не умею плавать.
